projects.title: Atlas Platform
projects.description: Ship the first public release of the Atlas humanoid platform — hardware, firmware, fleet coordination, and a customer-facing control plane.
projects.successCriteria:
- 100 beta units shipped to pilot customers
- p95 motion latency under 200ms
- 99.5% uptime over rolling 30 days
- OTA firmware updates verified end-to-end

channels.lastMessagePreview: PR is up — Marcus, can you sanity-check the thermal thresholds?
Waiting on security sign-off before we can rotate keys in prod.
Shadow run looks clean — bumping to 10% rollout.
Thermal model locked. Closing this out.

activity.context: ankle-torque-v2 — needs thermal threshold sanity check
security sign-off needed for key rotation

projects.title: Beacon Fleet
projects.description: Fleet coordination software that lets Atlas robots share state, divide tasks, and recover from peer failures in real time.
projects.successCriteria:
- 50-robot fleet demo in pilot warehouse
- Sub-second state propagation
- Zero data loss on leader failover

channels.lastMessagePreview: Switched to Raft with 200ms heartbeat — replays are clean now.
Map diff bandwidth is 12% lower with delta encoding.

projects.title: Cortex Perception
projects.description: Vision-language-action research for unstructured environments — pick-and-place in cluttered, deformable, or low-light settings.
projects.successCriteria:
- 90% success on unstructured pick benchmark
- Latency under 800ms end-to-end
- Reproducible eval pipeline

tickets.title: Eval harness v2 with video replay

channels.lastMessagePreview: Diffusion policy is at 78% on the cloth set — pushing to 85% by Friday.
Need a second pass on the video replay pipeline before this lands.

projects.title: Pulse Battery
projects.description: Solid-state battery optimization for 24-hour runtime — chemistry exploration, thermal modeling, and lifetime prediction.
projects.successCriteria:
- 24h continuous operation on prototype cells
- Cycle life above 1000 cycles at 80% capacity
- Thermal model within 2C of physical test

channels.lastMessagePreview: Solid-state cells hold the line — needs one more validation cycle.
Batch 3 samples arriving Friday — need a LabVIEW calibration update.

projects.title: Vanguard Field
projects.description: Field-deployment tooling for Atlas rollout — site surveys, install kits, remote diagnostics, and on-site engineer dispatch.
projects.successCriteria:
- 5 pilot sites live by end of Q3
- Mean install time under 4 hours
- Remote diagnostics covers 80% of field alerts

channels.lastMessagePreview: Offline-first sync landed — testing at the Memphis pilot tomorrow.
Need a Prometheus exporter for the new telemetry stream.
Memphis and Austin shifts confirmed for next week.

projects.title: Helios Onboarding
projects.description: Customer onboarding automation — tickets, training docs, proactive monitoring, and self-serve ramp for new pilots.
projects.successCriteria:
- Time-to-first-task under 30 minutes
- 90% customer activation rate
- Auto-resolve 60% of common issues

channels.lastMessagePreview: Conversion to first task is at 84% on the new flow.
Need input on which field alerts are noisy vs. useful.

messages.content: What's the status on the ankle torque controller?
Pilot unit 17 calibrated yesterday at 78% confidence. Marcus is sanity-checking thermal thresholds before we roll the new curve to the full fleet. Should land by end of week.
That's parked until ankle lands. Force feedback depends on the torque baseline. I'll pick it up Monday — likely 2-3 days of tuning.
v4 is mid-training. We're seeing a 4% improvement on synthetic cycles vs v3. Real-world validation starts once the cell supplier batch 3 arrives — Priya's tracking that.
Solid. Can you sync with Rafael on the thermal model assumptions?
Already on it. He's queued the next round of thermal data for Tuesday — I'll fold it into v5.
84% on the new flow, up from 67% on the legacy wizard. Main drop-off is at the workspace setup step — customers aren't sure what to pick. A/B testing simpler copy next week.
Cloth set at 78%, deformable at 64%. Action chunking helps cloth more than rigid. Marcus is going to review the ablation tomorrow.
Let's target 85% on cloth by Friday.
Plan: tighter grasp priors + 2 extra fine-tune epochs. Zara will own it.
Raft heartbeat dropped to 200ms. Replay tests are clean through 3 simulated leader crashes. One more sweep tomorrow, then I want James's eyes on the failover matrix.

channelMessages.content: PR is up — Marcus, can you sanity-check the thermal thresholds?
Looking now. The 200ms window might bite us at high torque — let me run a quick sim.
Just merged AT-108 to staging. Wizard is live for the next cohort.
Waiting on security sign-off before we can rotate keys in prod.
Reviewing the key rotation proposal now. Should have an answer within the hour.
Shadow run looks clean — bumping to 10% rollout.
Watch the p99 closely. If we see >800ms I'll roll back.
Thermal model locked. Closing this out.
Confirmed — solid-state cells hold the line under our test profile.
Switched to Raft with 200ms heartbeat — replays are clean now.
Field test scheduled for tomorrow — I'll bring back the failover matrix.
Map diff bandwidth is 12% lower with delta encoding.
Nice. That should fit comfortably in the per-robot cache budget.
Findings shipped, recommendations merged.
Diffusion policy is at 78% on the cloth set — pushing to 85% by Friday.
Want me to queue a fine-tune tonight?
Need a second pass on the video replay pipeline before this lands.
Solid-state cells hold the line — needs one more validation cycle.
I'll fold the data into PL-101 v5 once you ship the validation.
Batch 3 samples arriving Friday — need a LabVIEW calibration update.
Offline-first sync landed — testing at the Memphis pilot tomorrow.
Sweet. I'll ride along and capture install time metrics.
Need a Prometheus exporter for the new telemetry stream.
On it. Will have a draft exporter up by EOD.
Memphis and Austin shifts confirmed for next week.
Conversion to first task is at 84% on the new flow.
Workspace setup step is still the drop-off point. Looping in James on copy.
Need input on which field alerts are noisy vs. useful.
Top 20 articles updated and re-tagged.
Published. Will monitor search-to-resolution time over the next week.

chatQuickStart.label: Sprint planning
chatQuickStart.description: Pull open tickets, group by epic, propose a 2-week plan.

chatQuickStart.label: Review a PR
chatQuickStart.description: Summarize diff, surface risks, draft review comments.

chatQuickStart.label: Triage a bug report
chatQuickStart.description: Reproduce, prioritize, assign, draft a fix plan.

chatQuickStart.label: Draft release notes
chatQuickStart.description: Compile merged work since the last release into customer-facing notes.

chatQuickStart.label: Cost review
chatQuickStart.description: Break down last week's agent spend by project and flag outliers.

chatQuickStart.label: Onboard a new pilot
chatQuickStart.description: Spin up workspace, install kit checklist, schedule first sync.
